targets.name: code-and-config
targets.restoreMethod: git revert/cherry-pick plus gated IDrive e2 static deploy and Salad backend deploy

targets.name: idrive-e2-static-deployment
targets.backupOwner: IDrive e2 and GitHub build artifact
targets.restoreMethod: sync known-good dist artifact to IDrive e2 website buckets

targets.name: salad-backend
targets.sourceOfTruth: GitHub backend source and Salad container image/deployment
targets.rpo: latest committed backend source plus latest deployed container image
targets.restoreMethod: redeploy known-good backend container or roll Salad container group to known-good image

targets.name: salad-idrive-metadata
targets.sourceOfTruth: Salad API metadata and IDrive e2 metadata artifacts
targets.rpo: 24 hours for MVP metadata after first production release
targets.rto: 4 hours for small namespace restore dry-run
targets.restoreMethod: restore selected metadata prefixes into a staging artifact/API namespace, verify counts, then promote only after approval
targets.sensitiveHandling: never commit exports; never publish live sessions or OAuth state

targets.name: idrive-e2-user-objects
targets.rpo: object write acknowledged by IDrive e2
targets.rto: 4 hours for small user restore test; depends on object count
targets.restoreMethod: verify object list, checksums and signed GET/PUT flow; restore user-scoped objects only

releaseEvidence: IDrive e2 static deployment artifact id
blockingRisks: no IDrive e2 signed object restore test
static files served as SPA HTML
production data stored in legacy SQL or server filesystem
